title: AuditRemediationRunResult — outcome persisted to core.audit_remediation_runs.result
description: JSON Schema for the result JSONB column on core.audit_remediation_runs (src/will/governance/audit_remediation_runner.py). Flattened from RemediationResult (src/body/self_healing/remediation_models.py:131) — the dataclass fields are extracted individually and written as a plain dict. The full RemediationResult dataclass (with matched_patterns, unmatched_findings, fix_details arrays) is NOT stored; only the scalar summary fields and path references are persisted. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (persistence-boundary contract). Uses .schema.json suffix — intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

total_findings.description: Total audit violations present at the start of this remediation run.

fixes_attempted.description: Number of individual fix attempts made during the run.

fixes_succeeded.description: Number of fix attempts that applied without error.

improvement_delta.description: findings_before minus findings_after. Positive means fewer violations; negative means regressions were introduced.

validation_passed.description: True if the post-remediation audit shows net improvement (improvement_delta > 0).

findings_before.description: Audit violation count measured before fixes were applied.

findings_after.description: Audit violation count measured after fixes were applied. Present only when validation was run.

duration_sec.description: Wall-clock duration of the full remediation run in seconds.

audit_input_path.description: Repo-relative path to the audit findings file consumed as input.

remediation_output_path.description: Repo-relative path where the RemediationResult JSON evidence file was written.

validation_audit_path.description: Repo-relative path where the post-remediation validation audit was saved. Null if validation was skipped.
